title: Second headset connected with the mobile app
scenario: Verify that a newly connected second headset appears correctly with accurate data across all relevant pages in the mobile app.
steps: Ensure one headset is already registered on the Lens tenant.
Connect a second headset to the mobile app.
Navigate to the Inventory page and verify the new headset appears with correct name, version, private IP address, status, serial number, and date.
Navigate to the Device User / Mobile User page and verify the new headset's data is accurate.
Navigate to the Mobile profile page and verify the new headset's data is accurate.
Navigate to the Device profile page and verify the new headset's data is accurate.
expected: The second headset appears correctly on the Inventory page, Device User/Mobile User page, Mobile profile page, and Device profile page with accurate data including name, version, private IP address, status, serial number, and date.
